name: Fergus
description: Manage jobs in Fergus for field service and trade workflows.

api_token.label: Fergus Personal Access Token
api_token.help_text: Generate a Personal Access Token from Settings → Fergus API inside your Fergus account.

create_job.description: Creates a new job in Fergus from a work order. Set is_draft=true to create a draft (only job_type and title required), then use update_job to fill in details and finalise_job to activate it. For non-draft jobs, description, customer_id and site_id are also required.

job_type.description: Job type — must be one of: Quote, Estimate, Charge Up

title.description: Job title, e.g. Leaking Tap Repair – Kitchen Sink

description.description: Job description / work order details. Required for non-draft jobs.

customer_id.description: ID of the Fergus customer. Use search_customers to find it. Required for non-draft jobs.

site_id.description: ID of the site where work is to be done. Use list_sites to find it. Required for non-draft jobs.

customer_reference.description: External reference number from the maintenance partner (MP) work order.

is_draft.description: Set to true to create a draft job. Draft jobs only require job_type and title — fill in remaining details via update_job, then call finalise_job to activate.

update_job.description: Updates a DRAFT job in Fergus. Fergus only allows updating jobs that are still in draft status — this will fail on active jobs. Call finalise_job after updating to make the job active.

job_id.description: ID of the draft job to update

job_type.description: Job type — Quote, Estimate, or Charge Up

customer_reference.description: Updated external reference number from the MP work order

finalise_job.description: Finalises a draft job in Fergus, making it active and ready to assign to a technician. Call this after update_job once all job details are confirmed.

job_id.description: ID of the draft job to finalise

get_job.description: Retrieves full details of a single job from Fergus, including invoice and completion data for BCTI reporting.

job_id.description: ID of the job to retrieve

list_jobs.description: Lists jobs from Fergus with optional filters. Use status=Completed or status=Invoiced to pull jobs ready for BCTI outbound reporting to maintenance partners.

status.description: Filter by job status, e.g. Active, Completed, Invoiced

job_type.description: Filter by job type — Quote, Estimate, or Charge Up

sort_order.description: Sort order — asc or desc (default desc)

page_cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

search_customers.description: Search for customers in Fergus by name. Use this to find a customer_id before creating a job.

search.description: Search term — matches against customer name and other fields

page_cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

get_customer.description: Get full details of a single Fergus customer.

customer_id.description: ID of the customer to retrieve

list_sites.description: List sites (job locations) in Fergus. Use to find a site_id before creating a job.

search.description: Search term — matches against site address or name

page_cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

list_users.description: List all users (technicians and staff) in Fergus. Use to find user IDs when assigning jobs.

search.description: Search term — matches against user name

page_cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
